package rulecoverage

func PositiveLenStringForEmptyCheck() string {
    ruleID := "len_string_for_empty_check"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`len(s) == 0` used interchangeably with `s == \"\"`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
